data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of having different hours per location, but the provided evidence does not include any information regarding the operational hours of each location. While the use case mentions that different services are offered at different locations, it does not specify the hours of operation for each location, which is critical to confirm this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to support the requirement of different hours per location.
gaps: No evidence of different operational hours for each location.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
